'''tahate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:bachelorwise|bachelorwise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-h-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bachelorwise|bachelorwise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| tahate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:tahate|tahate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tahatesher|tahatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tahatesherĂ«m|tahatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tahatero|tahatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tahateshĂ«|tahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tahateshĂ«m|tahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitahatero|gokitahatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitahateshĂ«|gokitahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitahateshĂ«m|gokitahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotahankerom|gotahankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotahankeshĂ«|gotahankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotahankeshĂ«m|gotahankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotahankeya|gotahankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tahaterom|tahaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tahatemu|tahatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tahateya|tahateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitahaterom|gokitahaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitahatemu|gokitahatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitahateya|gokitahateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:tahahate|tahahate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tahahatesher|tahahatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tahahatesherĂ«m|tahahatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tahahatero|tahahatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tahahateshĂ«|tahahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tahahateshĂ«m|tahahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitahahatero|gokitahahatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitahahateshĂ«|gokitahahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitahahateshĂ«m|gokitahahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotahahankerom|gotahahankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotahahankeshĂ«|gotahahankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotahahankeshĂ«m|gotahahankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotahahankeya|gotahahankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tahahaterom|tahahaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tahahatemu|tahahatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tahahateya|tahahateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitahahaterom|gokitahahaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitahahatemu|gokitahahatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitahahateya|gokitahahateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:tĂŠhĂŠte|tĂŠhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tĂŠhĂŠtesher|tĂŠhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠhĂŠtesherĂ«m|tĂŠhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tĂŠhĂŠtero|tĂŠhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«|tĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m|tĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitĂŠhĂŠtero|gokitĂŠhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«|gokitĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokitĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotĂŠhĂŠnkerom|gotĂŠhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«|gotĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gotĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotĂŠhĂŠnkeya|gotĂŠhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tĂŠhĂŠterom|tĂŠhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠhĂŠtemu|tĂŠhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tĂŠhĂŠteya|tĂŠhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitĂŠhĂŠterom|gokitĂŠhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitĂŠhĂŠtemu|gokitĂŠhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitĂŠhĂŠteya|gokitĂŠhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:tafhafte|tafhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tafhaftesher|tafhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafhaftesherĂ«m|tafhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tafhaftero|tafhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tafhafteshĂ«|tafhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafhafteshĂ«m|tafhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitafhaftero|gokitafhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitafhafteshĂ«|gokitafhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitafhafteshĂ«m|gokitafhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotafhafnkerom|gotafhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotafhafnkeshĂ«|gotafhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotafhafnkeshĂ«m|gotafhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotafhafnkeya|gotafhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tafhafterom|tafhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafhaftemu|tafhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tafhafteya|tafhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitafhafterom|gokitafhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitafhaftemu|gokitafhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitafhafteya|gokitafhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
